qualities-catalog.description: Catalog of positive metagenic qualities for SURGE changelings

rows.name: 360-Degree Eyesight
rows.description: +1 vision Perception/Surprise Tests; -1 while moving; -1 Ranged Attack >10m. Cumulative.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with eye replacement. Incurs Freaks social modifiers.

rows.name: Animal Pelage (Camo Fur)
rows.description: +1 Sneaking Tests in decreased light or pattern-appropriate environments.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with other natural/artificial hair or skin modifications. Counts as Unusual Hair.

rows.name: Animal Pelage (Insulating Pelt)
rows.description: +2 Survival Tests in frigid environments. +4 Armor vs Cold. -2 Survival Tests in extreme heat.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with other natural/artificial hair or skin modifications. Counts as Unusual Hair.

rows.name: Animal Pelage (Quills)
rows.description: Defensive: grappled attacker takes DV (STR+1)P AP+1. Offensive: Exotic Melee Weapon (Quills) DV (STR+1)P Reach -- AP+1. Arms/legs must be exposed.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with other natural/artificial hair or skin modifications. Counts as Unusual Hair.

rows.name: Arcane Arrester
rows.description: Per level (max 2). Add Level x 2 dice to spell resistance. Against non-resisted spells, roll 2/4 dice and subtract hits from caster's hits.
rows.restrictions: Requires Magic attribute. Cannot combine with Magic Resistance. Affects self-cast spells.

rows.name: Balance Receptor
rows.description: +1 to balance tests, Agility-based Tests to maintain balance, Climbing, Jumping, all Gymnastics Tests.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with cyberears and balance augmenter.

rows.name: Beak
rows.description: Cannot chew; gizzard processes food. Reduces Lifestyle costs by 10%. +1 to resist ingested toxins.

rows.name: Beak (Raptor Beak)
rows.description: Combat beak. Unarmed Combat DV (STR+2)P, Reach -1, AP -2. Also grants Beak benefits.

rows.name: Bicardiac
rows.description: Second heart. Double fatigue damage interval for strenuous activities.
rows.restrictions: Compatible with synthacardium. Only primary heart can be augmented.

rows.name: Biosonar
rows.description: Echolocation via Free Action (Speak). Image out to 50m for Attack/Perception. +1 audio Perception. +1 DV vs sonic attacks.

rows.name: Bone Spikes
rows.description: Bony protrusions. Unarmed melee damage = (STR+2)P. Cannot wear standard armor (+50% cost for custom).

rows.name: Broadened Auditory Spectrum
rows.description: Choose Ultrasound or Infrasound. Perception Test to detect sounds in chosen band. +1 to Perception limit involving sound. May take twice.

rows.name: Camouflage (Basic)
rows.description: Skin changes color after 1 min exposure. +2 threshold to see character (standing still, no clothing). Fades in 10 min.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with any other dermal modification. Freaks social modifiers.

rows.name: Camouflage (Dynamic Coloration)
rows.description: Skin changes color even while moving. -2 to visual perception while moving, -4 if stationary. No clothing allowed.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with any other dermal modification. Freaks social modifiers.

rows.name: Celerity
rows.description: Walking = AGI x 3, Running = AGI x 6, Sprint = +1m/turn.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with leg/muscle-altering systems (cyberlimbs, muscle replacement/toner/augmentation) and Satyr Legs.

rows.name: Claws (Digging)
rows.description: +2 digging/moving earth tests. Combat: Unarmed DV (STR)P, Reach --, AP +1.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with cyberweapon or limb replacement. Cannot be retracted.

rows.name: Claws (Razor)
rows.description: Unarmed Combat DV (STR+1)P, AP -1.

rows.name: Claws (Retractable)
rows.description: Same as Razor Claws but can be retracted and hidden.

rows.name: Climate Adaptation
rows.description: Choose Desert or Arctic. +1 Survival Tests and fatigue resistance in chosen climate. -1 in opposite climate.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with dermal plating, skin modifications, suprathyroid gland.

rows.name: Corrosive Spit
rows.description: Exotic Ranged Weapon (Corrosive Spit) + AGI [Physical], range = Body meters. Acid damage DV 6P. Once per 30 minutes.

rows.name: Dermal Alteration (Bark Skin)
rows.description: +2 armor, cumulative with worn armor.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with any other natural/artificial skin modification.

rows.name: Dermal Alteration (Blubber)
rows.description: +2 armor vs Cold damage. -2 Perception Tests involving cold.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with any other natural/artificial skin modification.

rows.name: Dermal Alteration (Dragon Skin)
rows.description: +2 armor vs Fire damage. -2 Perception Tests involving heat.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with any other natural/artificial skin modification.

rows.name: Dermal Alteration (Granite Shell)
rows.description: +4 Hardened Armor (p. 397 SR5). Not stackable with worn armor for DR Tests but still provides 2 auto hits.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with any other natural/artificial skin modification.

rows.name: Dermal Alteration (Rhino Hide)
rows.description: +3 armor, cumulative with worn armor.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with any other natural/artificial skin modification.

rows.name: Dermal Deposits
rows.description: +1 natural armor, cumulative with worn armor. Stacks with troll natural armor.

rows.name: Defensive Secretion
rows.description: Skin exudes defensive liquid when agitated. Touching bare skin: -1 all tests for 24h or Medicine+Logic [Mental] (2).

rows.name: Electroception (Electrosense)
rows.description: Sense electromagnetic fields. Observe in Detail: Perception+Intuition [Mental]. Range = Essence meters.

rows.name: Electroception (Technosense)
rows.description: Sense wireless technology signals. Observe in Detail: Perception+Intuition [Mental]. Range = Essence meters.
rows.restrictions: Cannot manipulate signals. Noise modifiers apply.

rows.name: Elongated Limbs
rows.description: Reach +1 (cumulative). Special clothing/armor at +10% cost. Ill-fitting armor reduced by 10%.

rows.name: Fangs
rows.description: Unarmed Combat DV (STR+1)P, Reach -1, AP --.

rows.name: Frog Tongue
rows.description: Long adhesive tongue. Snatch objects < unaugmented STR x 100g. If has Natural Venom, can deliver touch melee via Exotic Melee Weapon (Frog Tongue).

rows.name: Functional Tail (Balance)
rows.description: 1-2m tail not under conscious control. +1 Balance, Climbing, Gymnastics, Jumping tests.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with other tail mods. Freaks social modifiers. Sitting penalty: -1 all actions.

rows.name: Functional Tail (Paddle)
rows.description: Broad beaver-like tail. +2 Swimming Tests.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with other tail mods. Freaks social modifiers. Sitting penalty: -1 all actions.

rows.name: Functional Tail (Prehensile)
rows.description: Manipulate like extra limb. Effective STR = half unaugmented STR (round down). -4 fine manipulation. No extra attack.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with other tail mods. Freaks social modifiers. Sitting penalty: -1 all actions.

rows.name: Functional Tail (Thagomizer)
rows.description: Spiked prehensile tail. Exotic Melee Weapon (Thagomizer) DV (STR+3)P, Reach 1, AP -1.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with other tail mods. Freaks social modifiers. Sitting penalty: -1 all actions.

rows.name: Gills (Partial)
rows.description: Air or Aqua gills. Fatigue Test durations halved in non-native environment.

rows.name: Gills (Full)
rows.description: Air or Aqua gills. Function equally in either environment with no penalty.

rows.name: Glamour
rows.description: +2 Social Limit. +1 all Social Skill Tests except Intimidation. Suffers Distinctive Style effects.

rows.name: Goring Horns
rows.description: Exotic Melee Weapon (Horns) DV (STR+2)P, Reach --, AP -1.

rows.name: Greasy Skin
rows.description: -2 to Subduing melee attacks against character (>50% body exposed).
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with extensive body hair or skin modifications/qualities.

rows.name: Keen-Eared
rows.description: +1 audio-based Perception Tests.

rows.name: Larger Tusks
rows.description: Unarmed Combat DV (STR+2)P, Reach --, AP --.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with mouth implants (except Proboscis). Freaks social modifiers.

rows.name: Low-Light Vision (Feline Eyes)
rows.description: Natural low-light vision with reflective feline slit irises.
rows.restrictions: Cannot combine with eye replacement. Freaks social modifiers.

rows.name: Low-Light Vision (Normal Eyes)
rows.description: Natural low-light vision with normal-looking eyes.

rows.name: Magic Sense
rows.description: Detect magic. Intuition+Willpower [Astral]. Range = Magic x 5 meters (min 5m).

rows.name: Magnetoception
rows.description: +1 Navigation Tests. Detect electronics/power/magnetic anomalies: Perception+Intuition [Mental] vs Object Resistance within 5m.

rows.name: Marsupial Pouch
rows.description: Smuggling Compartment with Concealability -6.

rows.name: Metagenic (Attribute) Improvement
rows.description: Raise min and max of one Mental or Physical attribute by 1. Once per attribute. Cumulative with Exceptional Attribute.

rows.name: Metahuman Traits
rows.description: Cosmetic metahuman features. +1 disguise as resembled metatype.

rows.name: Monkey Paws
rows.description: +2 Gymnastics, Climbing, Zero-G Movement when barefoot (+1 with accommodating shoes).

rows.name: Nasty Vibe
rows.description: +2 Intimidation Tests and fear-instilling attempts.

rows.name: Natural Venom
rows.description: Body produces animal toxin (immune to own). Cost = Vector cost + Severity cost. Vectors: Inhalation (3), Contact (5), Injected (0, requires Fangs).

rows.name: Ogre Stomach
rows.description: Digest unusual substances. Lifestyle -20%. +2 Toxin Resistance vs ingested toxins.

rows.name: Photometabolism
rows.description: Photosynthesis supplements diet. Lifestyle -10%. -1 all Social Tests (uncomfortable at night/in shade).
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with Nocturnal and all skin/hair modifications.

rows.name: Proboscis
rows.description: Prehensile trunk. Exotic Melee Weapon (Trunk) DV (STR-1)P, Reach --, AP +1. -2 fine manipulation. Effective STR = unaugmented STR.

rows.name: Satyr Legs
rows.description: Running = AGI x 6, Sprint = +1m/turn. +2 STR to kicking attack damage.
rows.restrictions: Freaks social modifiers. Incompatible with Celerity.

rows.name: Setae
rows.description: Gecko hands. Always use assisted climbing rates (hands must be exposed).

rows.name: Shiva Arms
rows.description: Per pair. Extra arm pair. Hold/carry double. Off-hand penalties apply. Can use Multiple Attacks with firearms. Max 2 pairs (6 arms).

rows.name: Thermal Sensitivity
rows.description: Non-visual Perception to detect heat sources within 10m. Not fooled by Invisibility/Silence. Reduces Visibility and Light/Glare modifiers by 1 level.

rows.name: Thermographic Vision
rows.description: Natural thermographic vision (identical to dwarf/troll).

rows.name: Thorns
rows.description: +1 DV to Unarmed Combat attacks. -1 all Physical Tests. Custom clothing required (+20-100% cost).

rows.name: Underwater Vision
rows.description: Adapted eye membrane. Unrestricted vision in/out of water. Use underwater visibility modifiers as if wearing goggles.

rows.name: Vomeronasal Organ
rows.description: +2 smell-based Perception. +1 Social Tests when can smell target. -1 all tests from strong odors. Tailored pheromones provide 2x bonus vs this character.

rows.name: Webbed Digits
rows.description: +2 Swimming Tests. -1 fine manipulations with webbed digits.

electroception-table.description: Information revealed by Electroception based on hits and sense type

rows.information: Presence and direction of the electrical field's source
Presence and direction of wireless signal(s)
Relative size and type of the electrical source (biological or technological)
Strength of the wireless signals (active wireless or transmitter)
Exact position of the field's source or if the biological source has been augmented (cyberware, bioware change the 'flavor' of the field)
Presence of cyberware implants or gear with active wireless
Personal orientation and height/depth within 5 meters in relation to the earth's magnetic field; type of biological source (metahuman type, animal size)
Type of device (RFID tag, commlink, smartlink, drone, identification of technomancer abilities present within observed area)
Presence of nanites; presence of stealth RFID tags; identification of a technomancer

animal-toxins-table.description: Toxin severity levels for the Natural Venom quality
